calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Interest In Real Property Located At 626-628 3rd Ave. Sf Ca 94118
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for Alpana Samant.

The Court noted that the property was transferred to obtain Ellis Act Rights to move in relatives. Mr. Sarreshtehdary stated that the prior Attorney that helped with the eviction advised the Decedent that a Trust can't be a relative, that 25% of the property came out of the Trust, that 75% remained in the Trust and that the deed was recorded on April 29, 2016. The Court stated that it is inclined to deny the petition, raised the issue of two deeds being recorded (4/29/16 and 5/13/16) and questions whether the second deed transferred an additional 25% of 100%, or 25% of 75%, and stated that either 75% or 56.25% remains in the Trust depending on how the second deed transferred the property. Mr. Sarreshtehdary talked about having to do probate and elected to withdraw the petition. The Petition for Order Confirming Interest in Real Property is withdrawn and dismissed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Interest In Real Property Located At 626-628 3rd Ave. Sf Ca 94118
